name: Receipt Generator
description: Post-payment receipt PDF. Trigger after Stripe/online payment. Client-side (0 WU), secure. Auto-calc, PAID watermark, upload to Bubble for email.
author: Receipt Generator

elements.name: Receipt Generator
elements.description: Place on post-payment page. Configure brand. Use Generate & Upload Receipt after Stripe success. Map transaction_id and total from payment provider.

actions.name: Generate Receipt PDF
actions.description: Generate and download receipt PDF to browser.

fields.name: Debug Mode
fields.description: Log every step to console. Disable in production.

fields.name: Payment Confirmed
fields.description: Mandatory. Pass Stripe Charge's succeeded (boolean). Security guardrail.

fields.name: Transaction ID
fields.description: From Stripe/payment provider. Required for security.

fields.name: Line Items (JSON)
fields.description: [{description, quantity, unit_price}] — amount auto-calc if omitted

fields.name: Total
fields.description: From payment provider. Auto-calc if only line items provided.

actions.name: Generate & Upload Receipt
actions.description: Generate receipt PDF, upload to Bubble storage, return file_url. Use in workflow: Stripe success → this → pdf_is_ready → Send Email with pdf_url.

states.name: PDF URL
states.description: Bubble file URL after upload. Use in Send Email attachment.

events.name: PDF Generated
events.description: Fired when receipt PDF was downloaded.

events.name: PDF is Ready
events.description: Fired when receipt uploaded to Bubble. Use pdf_url in Send Email.

events.name: PDF Error
events.description: Fired when generation or upload failed.
